title: fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/buildkit to v0.24.0
body:
Coming soon: The Renovate bot (GitHub App) will be renamed to Mend. PRs from Renovate will soon appear from 'Mend'. Learn more [here](https://redirect.github.com/renovatebot/renovate/discussions/37842).

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/moby/buildkit](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit) | `v0.23.2` -> `v0.24.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.24.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.23.2/v0.24.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the Dependency Dashboard for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>moby/buildkit (github.com/moby/buildkit)</summary>

### [`v0.24.0`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.24.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.23.2...v0.24.0)

Welcome to the v0.24.0 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
<https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues>.

##### Contributors

- Tõnis Tiigi
- CrazyMax
- Sebastiaan van Stijn
- Akihiro Suda
- Andrés Delfino
- Alberto Contreras
- Alberto Garcia Hierro
- Anthony Nandaa
- Baptiste Girard-Carrabin
- Derek McGowan
- Justin Chadwell
- Kohei Tokunaga
- Michael Dwan

##### Notable Changes

- Built-in Dockerfile frontend has been updated to [v1.18.0](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/dockerfile%2F1.18.0)
- LLB Git operation now allows controlling if submodules should be initialized (default) or skipped. [#​6173](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6173)
- Max-parallelism control can now also be set with `--max-parallelism` daemon flag. [#​6105](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6105)
- Improve errors when using build arguments in `COPY --from` flag value. [#​6153](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6153)
- Debug server now supports new endpoints for inspecting the cache key database and remote cache manifests. In order to debug plaintexts of the cache keys `--save-cache-debug` needs to be enabled in the daemon. [#​6076](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6076) [#​6061](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6061) [#​6133](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6133)
- Base Alpine version has been updated to 3.22. [#​6048](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6048)
- Client now allows configuring exporter content store. [#​6045](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6045)
- Release binary artifacts now use Git commit time as timestamp. [#​6037](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6037)
- Fix incorrect empty checkout when accessing Git source with subdir pointing to a submodule. [#​6170](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6170)
- Fix allowing device entitlement for buildkitd daemon with startup flags. [#​6080](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6080)
- Fix possible panic from BoltDB when copying lots of files between build steps. [#​6159](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6159) [#​6136](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6136) [#​6165](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6165)
- Fix possible deadlocks from the error handler in the sync package. [#​6158](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6158)
- Fix issue with exporting cache with different compression formats for images with lots of layers. [#​6092](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6092) [#​6088](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6088)
- Fix displaying error details on unexpected response status code. [#​6067](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6067)
- Fix incorrect empty checkout when accessing Git source with subdir pointing to a submodule. [#​6170](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6170)

##### Dependency Changes

- **github.com/containerd/containerd/v2**                                           v2.1.3 -> v2.1.4
- **github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/v2**                                              v2.0.5 -> v2.0.7
- **github.com/docker/cli**                                                         v28.2.2 -> v28.3.3
- **github.com/docker/docker**                                                      v28.2.2 -> v28.3.3
- **github.com/moby/profiles/seccomp**                                              v0.1.0 ***new***
- **github.com/urfave/cli**                                                         v1.22.16 -> v1.22.17
- **go.etcd.io/bbolt**                                                              v1.4.0 -> v1.4.3
- **go.opentelemetry.io/contrib/instrumentation/net/http/httptrace/otelhttptrace**  v0.56.0 -> v0.60.0
- **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/exporters/otlp/otlpmetric/otlpmetricgrpc**             v1.31.0 -> v1.35.0
- **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/exporters/otlp/otlpmetric/otlpmetrichttp**             v1.31.0 -> v1.35.0
- **golang.org/x/sync**                                                             v0.14.0 -> v0.16.0

Previous release can be found at [v0.23.2](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.23.2)

</details>

---
